creator: nejc@skoberne.net
text:
<snip>
===> daily (install)
install -o root -g wheel  -m 755 100.clean-disks 110.clean-tmps 120.clean-preserve 130.clean-msgs 140.clean-rwho 150.clean-hoststat 200.bac$
===> security (install)
install -o root -g wheel  -m 755 100.chksetuid 200.chkmounts 300.chkuid0 400.passwdless 410.logincheck 500.ipfwdenied 510.ipfdenied 520.pfd$
===> weekly (install)
install -o root -g wheel  -m 755 310.locate 320.whatis 330.catman 340.noid 400.status-pkg 999.local /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/periodic/wee$
===> monthly (install)
install -o root -g wheel  -m 755 200.accounting 999.local /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/periodic/monthly
cd /usr/src/etc/rc.d; make install
install -o root -g wheel  -m 555 DAEMON FILESYSTEMS LOGIN NETWORKING SERVERS abi accounting addswap adjkerntz amd apm apmd archdep atm1 atm$
cd /usr/src/etc/../gnu/usr.bin/send-pr; make etc-gnats-freefall
install -o root -g wheel -m 0644  /usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/send-pr/categories  /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/gnats/freefall
cd /usr/src/etc/../share/termcap; make etc-termcap
ln -fs /usr/share/misc/termcap /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/termcap
cd /usr/src/etc/../usr.sbin/rmt; make etc-rmt
rm -f /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/rmt
ln -s /usr/sbin/rmt /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/rmt
cd /usr/src/etc/pam.d; make install
install -o root  -g wheel -m 444  README  /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/pam.d/README
install -o root -g wheel  -m 644 atrun cron ftpd gdm imap kde login other passwd pop3 rsh sshd su system telnetd xdm /jail/base.080806-1258$
/jail/base.080806-1258/etc/pam.d/ftp -> /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/pam.d/ftpd
cd /usr/src/etc; install -o root -g wheel -m 0444  /usr/src/etc/../contrib/openbsm/etc/audit_class  /usr/src/etc/../contrib/openbsm/etc/aud$
cd /usr/src/etc; install -o root -g wheel -m 0600  /usr/src/etc/../contrib/openbsm/etc/audit_control  /usr/src/etc/../contrib/openbsm/etc/a$
cd /usr/src/etc; install -o root -g wheel -m 0500  /usr/src/etc/../contrib/openbsm/etc/audit_warn /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/security
+ ln -s ../var/named/etc/namedb /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/namedb
cd /usr/src/etc/namedb; make install
install -o root -g wheel  -m 644 named.conf named.root /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/namedb
===> master (install)
install -o root -g wheel  -m 644 empty.db localhost-forward.db localhost-reverse.db /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/namedb/master
cd /usr/src/etc/sendmail; make distribution
install -o root -g wheel -m 644  /usr/src/etc/sendmail/freebsd.mc freebsd.cf /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/mail
install -o root -g wheel -m 444  /usr/src/etc/sendmail/freebsd.submit.mc freebsd.submit.cf /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/mail
install -o root -g wheel -m 444  /usr/src/etc/sendmail/../../contrib/sendmail/src/helpfile /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/mail
install -o root -g wheel -m 640  /dev/null /jail/base.080806-1258/var/log/sendmail.st
install -o root -g wheel -m 644  freebsd.cf /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/mail/sendmail.cf
install -o root -g wheel -m 444  freebsd.submit.cf /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/mail/submit.cf
cd /usr/src/etc; install -o root -g wheel -m 644  /usr/src/etc/../crypto/openssh/ssh_config  /usr/src/etc/../crypto/openssh/sshd_config  /u$
cd /usr/src/etc; install -o root -g wheel -m 644  /usr/src/etc/../crypto/openssl/apps/openssl.cnf /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/ssl
cd /usr/src/etc/root;  install -o root -g wheel -m 644  dot.k5login /jail/base.080806-1258/root/.k5login;
cd /usr/src/etc/root;  install -o root -g wheel -m 644  dot.cshrc /jail/base.080806-1258/root/.cshrc;  install -o root -g wheel -m 644  dot$
cd /usr/src/etc/mtree; install -o root -g wheel -m 444  BSD.include.dist BSD.local.dist BSD.root.dist BSD.usr.dist  BSD.var.dist BSD.x11.di$
cd /usr/src/etc/ppp; install -o root -g wheel -m 600  ppp.conf /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/ppp
cd /usr/src/etc/mail; install -o root -g wheel -m 644  Makefile README mailer.conf access.sample virtusertable.sample  mailertable.sample a$
+ ln -s mail/aliases /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/aliases
install -o root -g operator -m 664 /dev/null  /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/dumpdates
install -o nobody -g wheel -m 644 /dev/null  /jail/base.080806-1258/var/db/locate.database
install -o root -g wheel -m 644 /usr/src/etc/minfree  /jail/base.080806-1258/var/crash
cd /usr/src/etc/..; install -o root -g wheel -m 444  COPYRIGHT /jail/base.080806-1258/
install -o root -g wheel -m 444  /usr/src/etc/../sys/amd64/conf/GENERIC.hints  /jail/base.080806-1258/boot/device.hints
</snip>

How-To-Repeat: While updating system via "make buildworld", "make installworld" and
then "make distribution", there are two lines which are printed to stderr
(for unknown reason): 

+ ln -s ../var/named/etc/namedb /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/namedb
+ ln -s mail/aliases /jail/base.080806-1258/etc/aliases

which is a bit annoying when running update in a script which sends stdout
to a file and stderr to the screen.
